name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32)
description: Measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to work performance. Predicts work behaviour, competencies, and job fit across all levels. Widely used for selection, development and leadership assessment.

name: OPQ32r
description: Shortened version of OPQ32 with 104 items. Same 32 personality scales. Faster to complete while retaining predictive validity. Good for high-volume screening.

name: Motivational Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses 18 dimensions of motivation that energise and direct behaviour at work. Useful for understanding what drives performance, engagement, and retention.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to work with numerical data in tables and graphs. Assesses inference and interpretation skills with numerical information. Standard for roles requiring data analysis.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and evaluate written information. Tests True/False/Cannot Say responses to passages. Key for roles requiring strong communication or analysis of written material.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns, rules, and logical relationships in abstract material. Indicates general problem-solving and analytical thinking capability.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions from rules and conditions. Assesses critical thinking and logical analysis. Suitable for technical and analytical roles.

name: Verify G+ (General Ability)
description: Combined cognitive ability test covering numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning. Provides a general cognitive index. Efficient for broad screening across many role types.

name: Verify Numerical Ability
description: Next-generation numerical test replacing Verify Numerical Reasoning. Measures deriving numerical problems from written context, calculating equations, and working with workplace numerical data.

name: Verify Verbal Ability
description: Next-generation verbal test. Measures comprehension, evaluation, and use of written information in workplace contexts. Replacement for Verify Verbal Reasoning.

name: General Ability — Adaptive (Verify Cognitive Ability)
description: Adaptive cognitive assessment covering numerical, verbal, and logical reasoning. Adapts difficulty to candidate ability level. Faster and more precise than fixed tests.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses knowledge and application of Java 8 programming including lambdas, streams, new date/time API, and OOP. For software developer roles requiring Java proficiency.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level)
description: Tests advanced Java concepts including multithreading, collections framework, design patterns, JVM internals. For senior Java developers.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming skills including syntax, data structures, OOP, libraries. For roles requiring Python development or data scripting.

name: SQL (New)
description: Measures SQL querying skills including SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY, subqueries, and database design. For data analyst, developer, or DBA roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Assesses JavaScript knowledge covering ES6+, DOM manipulation, async/await, closures, and web development concepts.

name: C# (New)
description: Tests C# programming ability including .NET framework, LINQ, async programming, OOP principles. For .NET developer roles.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Assesses .NET development skills including WCF, ASP.NET, Entity Framework, and LINQ for enterprise application development.

name: Automata - Fix (Coding Simulation)
description: Hands-on coding simulation where candidates fix broken code. Tests practical debugging skills across multiple programming languages. More realistic than MCQ coding tests.

name: Automata Pro
description: Full coding simulation platform testing ability to write working code from scratch. Supports multiple languages. For senior software engineering roles.

name: Technology Professional 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: Predicts success in technology roles by measuring cognitive and behavioural attributes. Covers problem-solving, learning agility, and work style. Combines ability and personality measurement.

name: Entry Level Sales 7.1 (International)
description: Job-focused assessment for entry-level sales positions. Measures drive, persuasion, customer orientation, and resilience. Norm-referenced against entry-level sales populations.

name: Sales Representative Solution
description: Comprehensive assessment for sales representative roles. Measures persuasion, resilience, customer focus, and achievement motivation. Strong predictive validity for sales performance.

name: Numerical Reasoning — Intermediate Level
description: Intermediate-level numerical reasoning assessment for front-line manager and supervisor roles. Focuses on practical workplace numerical problems.

name: Verbal Reasoning — Intermediate Level
description: Intermediate verbal reasoning test for clerical, front-line, and supervisory roles. Measures ability to understand and use written information in work contexts.

name: Calculation
description: Tests basic arithmetic and numerical calculation without a calculator. Suitable for clerical, administration, and customer-facing roles requiring numerical accuracy.

name: Checking
description: Assesses speed and accuracy in checking data, text, and codes. Critical for data entry, administration, banking, and any role requiring careful attention to detail.

name: Work Strengths
description: Measures 8 motivational and personality strengths relevant to job performance. Quick to administer. Provides insights into a person's natural work style and where they are most effective.

name: Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire (CCSQ7.2)
description: Personality measure specifically designed for customer-facing roles. Measures service orientation, patience, resilience, teamwork. Validated against contact centre performance.

name: Customer Service Simulation
description: Simulates realistic customer service interactions. Candidates handle customer queries, complaints, and multi-tasking scenarios. Measures job-related competencies directly.

name: Inductive Reasoning
description: Classic SHL inductive reasoning test measuring pattern recognition and abstract thinking. Widely used across all role types as a measure of general cognitive ability.

name: Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of mechanical concepts and physical principles. Used for engineering, maintenance, manufacturing, and technical roles.

name: Spatial Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to visualize and manipulate 2D and 3D shapes. Relevant for engineering, design, architecture, and technical trades.

name: Graduate Managerial Assessment
description: Battery designed for graduate and early professional hiring. Combines cognitive ability and personality measures. Benchmarked against graduate management population.

name: Managerial and Graduate Item Bank (MGIB — Advanced)
description: High-level numerical and verbal reasoning battery for senior professional and managerial candidates. More demanding than Verify tests. Used for director and executive selection.

name: Scenarios (SJT)
description: Situational Judgement Test presenting realistic workplace scenarios. Measures judgement, decision-making, and alignment to organisational values. Can be customised by role.

name: Universal Competency Report (UCR)
description: OPQ-based report mapping personality to SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Generates competency potential ratings. Used widely in management and leadership development.

name: Leadership Report (OPQ based)
description: OPQ-based report profiling leadership potential across vision, engagement, and execution dimensions. Used for executive assessment and succession planning.

name: Team Impact Report (OPQ based)
description: Shows how an individual's personality affects team dynamics using Belbin-like team roles. Useful for team building, coaching, and development interventions.

name: Agile Assessment
description: Tests knowledge of Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, and SAFe. For software development, product management, and IT project management roles.

name: Selenium (Automation Testing)
description: Assesses knowledge of Selenium WebDriver for automated testing. For QA automation and software testing roles.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Tests understanding of ML algorithms, model evaluation, feature engineering, and common libraries (scikit-learn, etc.). For data scientist and ML engineer roles.

name: Data Analysis using Excel
description: Simulation-based test measuring ability to use Excel for data analysis tasks including formulas, pivot tables, charts, and lookups.

name: General Salesability
description: Predicts potential in sales roles. Measures drive, optimism, interpersonal effectiveness, and customer focus. Can be used across B2B and B2C sales contexts.

name: Bank Administrative Assistant 8.1 (International)
description: Job-focused battery for bank administrative roles. Tests numerical checking, verbal ability, and administrative attention to detail. Industry-specific norms.

name: Contact Centre Simulation (Next-gen)
description: Realistic simulation of contact centre work environment including call handling, data entry, and multi-tasking. Measures speed, accuracy, and customer interaction skills.

name: Situational Judgement Test — Manager
description: SJT designed for manager and team leader roles. Scenarios cover coaching, conflict resolution, performance management, and decision-making in team contexts.

name: Numerical Reasoning — Graduate Level
description: Graduate-targeted numerical reasoning test. Provides a demanding assessment of quantitative reasoning ability. Suitable for graduate schemes and early-career professionals.

name: IT Support Professional 8.0 (International)
description: Job-focused assessment for IT support and helpdesk roles. Measures problem-solving, communication, customer focus, and technical aptitude relevant to IT support.

name: Retail Sales Associate 8.0 (International)
description: Job-focused battery for retail sales roles. Assesses customer orientation, reliability, teamwork, and sales motivation. Validated against retail performance outcomes.

name: Supervisor 8.0 (International)
description: Assessment battery for first-line supervisor roles. Covers team management, problem-solving, performance management, and reliability.

name: Advanced IT Assessment
description: Cognitive and technical skills battery for advanced IT roles. Combines abstract reasoning with programming and systems knowledge assessment.

name: Cyber Security Fundamentals
description: Tests foundational cybersecurity knowledge including network security, threat analysis, encryption, and security protocols. For security analyst and IT security roles.

name: Cloud Computing (AWS) Fundamentals
description: Assesses AWS cloud fundamentals including EC2, S3, Lambda, IAM, VPC. For cloud engineer and DevOps roles requiring AWS knowledge.

name: DevOps (New)
description: Tests knowledge of DevOps practices including CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, infrastructure as code, and monitoring. For DevOps engineer roles.

name: Operational Safety Behaviour (OSB)
description: Measures safety-relevant personality and behavioural characteristics. Predicts likelihood of safe behaviour in operational roles. Used in oil and gas, manufacturing, and utilities.

name: Reading Comprehension
description: Assesses understanding of written text and ability to draw inferences. Used for roles requiring strong reading ability such as legal, compliance, and administrative positions.

name: Microsoft Office Simulation (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
description: Simulation-based test of Microsoft Office skills covering Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. For administrative and business support roles.

name: Business Analyst Simulation
description: Simulates business analysis tasks including requirements gathering, process mapping, and stakeholder communication. For BA and systems analyst roles.

name: Project Management (New)
description: Tests project management knowledge covering planning, risk, resource management, and PMBOK/PRINCE2 concepts. For project manager and coordinator roles.
